title: Burger Bonanza Day!
story: Every May 28, Americans celebrate National Hamburger Day by firing up grills and flipping juicy patties! Restaurants offer special deals on their best burgers, while families host backyard cookouts with all the fixings. Food lovers share photos of towering burgers stacked with cheese, bacon, lettuce, and pickles on social media. Some people try crazy burger challenges or visit famous burger joints they've never been to before. Whether you like yours plain or loaded with toppings, this tasty holiday brings people together over one of America's favorite foods!
activity_question: What do restaurants typically do on National Hamburger Day?
bonus_fact: Americans eat about 50 billion burgers every year!

title: Berry Sweet Cheesecake Celebration
story: Every May 28, dessert lovers across America celebrate National Blueberry Cheesecake Day by indulging in this creamy, fruity treat! Bakeries showcase their best blueberry cheesecakes with fresh berries piled high on top. Home bakers share photos of their homemade creations on social media, from classic New York-style to no-bake versions. Restaurants offer special cheesecake deals and limited-time blueberry flavors. Some people host cheesecake parties where everyone brings a different variety to share. It's the perfect excuse to enjoy one of America's favorite desserts!
activity_question: What do bakeries typically put on top of their blueberry cheesecakes on this holiday?
bonus_fact: New York-style cheesecake was actually invented in the 1900s by a New York chef!
